Service  
Agreement

## Identification of Riverse (Rainbow)

Simplified joint stock company (« Société par actions simplifiée »)

Registered under the number 908 082 332

with the Registry of Trade and Companies of Créteil, France

Having its head office located at 28 avenue des Pépinières, 94260 Fresnes, France.

## Arc Platform Subscription

Duration of subscription to the Arc Platform: twelve (12) months.

## Description of the Project

\[to be completed\]

## Service offers for the Project

### Pre-Issuance offer (optional for early stage developers)

<div class="joplin-table-wrapper"><table><thead><tr><th><p><strong>Process</strong></p></th><th><ul><li>Access to Arc Platform with a dedicated certification manager</li><li>You input existing data, define key assumptions, and flag open questions</li></ul></th></tr><tr><th><p><strong>Deliverables</strong></p></th><th><ul><li>Draft Project Design Document &amp; Monitoring Plan</li><li>Carbon credit issuance forecast</li><li>Dedicated Rainbow Registry page to showcase your project</li></ul></th></tr><tr><th><p><strong>Benefits</strong></p></th><th><ul><li>Clarity on all certification requirements and next steps</li><li>Strengthen your position with investors and buyers by showing a clear path to high-quality ICVCM-endorsed removal credits</li><li>Low time commitment on your side</li></ul></th></tr></thead></table></div>

### Issuance offer

<div class="joplin-table-wrapper"><table><thead><tr><th><p><strong>Process</strong></p></th><th><ul><li>Access to Arc Platform with a dedicated certification manager</li><li>3rd-party validation audit, enabling 5 years of carbon credit issuance</li><li>Regular 3rd-party verification audit to verify and issue credits (at least once a year)</li><li>Annual 3rd-party site audit for continued validation (once per year for the duration of crediting period)</li><li>Go-to-Market of the carbon credits through Rainbow Registry</li></ul></th></tr><tr><th><p><strong>Deliverables</strong></p></th><th><ul><li>Finalized Project Design Document &amp; Monitoring Plan</li><li>Carbon credit issuance</li><li>Completed Rainbow Registry page to showcase your project</li></ul></th></tr><tr><th><p><strong>Benefits</strong></p></th><th><ul><li>Issue credits on a regular basis based on your business needs</li><li>Manage your certification and verification steps based on your cash-flows</li><li>Access a large pool of carbon credits retailers</li></ul></th></tr><tr><th></th><th></th></tr></thead></table></div>

## Fees and charges

<div class="joplin-table-wrapper"><table><thead><tr><th><p><strong>Pre-issuance fee</strong></p></th><th><ul><li>2,500€ (one-off fee)</li></ul></th></tr><tr><th><p><strong>Platform fee</strong></p></th><th><p>Annual Arc Platform fee (Subscription for 1 year from the date of signature of the Service Agreement)</p><ul><li>Until 5,000 credits per year - 5,000€</li><li>From 5,001 to 10,000 credits per year - +5,000€</li><li>Per tranche of 10,000 credits - +5,000€</li></ul></th></tr><tr><th><p><strong>Site audit fee</strong></p></th><th><p>3rd party validation on site audit fee per year</p><ul><li>2,500€ for the annual site audit across sites</li></ul></th></tr><tr><th><p><strong>Verification fee</strong></p></th><th><p>3rd-party verification audit fee per year</p><ul><li>1,500€ for each issuance</li></ul></th></tr><tr><th><p><strong>Credit Issuance fee</strong></p></th><th><p>Fee per credit (cumulative over a calendar year for all projects)</p><ul><li>From 1 to 20,000 credits: 5€ per credit</li><li>20,001 to 50,000 credits: 4€ per credit</li><li>50,001 to 100,000 credits: 3€ per credit</li><li>Above 100,001 credits: 2€ per credit</li></ul></th></tr><tr><th><p><strong>Payment terms</strong></p></th><th><ul><li>Platform fee: due at signature of the Service Agreement or upon renewal period</li><li>Site audit fee: due at site audit launch</li><li>Verification fee: due at verification launch</li><li>Credit Issuance fee: due at the transfer of each credit</li></ul></th></tr><tr><th></th><th></th></tr></thead></table></div>

## Contractual documents

The following documents constitute the agreement between the Project Developer and Rainbow (the "**Agreement**"):

- This commercial proposal (or "**Service Agreement**");
- the [Rainbow Standard Documentation](https://docs.rainbowstandard.io/rainbow-standard-documents/rainbow-standard-rules); and
- the appendix "[General Terms Arc](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1WisAxJryC2L9-4jTWKGTJn5xfTmmu004/view?usp=sharing)".

In the event of any contradiction between these documents, the terms of the higher-ranking documents shall prevail, except in the event of a derogation from this contractual hierarchy provided for by a specific mention in the documents. The Agreement prevails over the terms and conditions appearing on all documents issued by the Project Developer.

<div class="joplin-table-wrapper"><table><thead><tr><th></th><th></th></tr><tr><th><h2><a id="_9ham7qicgr6v"></a>Signature</h2></th><th></th></tr><tr><th><p>By signing this Service Agreement, the Client fully accepts the Agreement and expressly acknowledges awareness of all the documents comprising it.</p></th><th></th></tr></thead></table></div>
